attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL)

FROM

 (
 select   PAYMENT_SCHEDULE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from DL_ACMSTG.STG_CG1_AR_PYMNT_SCHEDULES_ALL
 minus
 select   PAYMENT_SCHEDULE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from DL_ACCUM.CG1_AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
ACM.PAYMENT_SCHEDULE_ID = STG_CG1_AR_PYMNT_SCHEDULES_ALL.PAYMENT_SCHEDULE_ID
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_AR_PYMNT_SCHEDULES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
